# DayDrop: Countdowns
> The simplest countdown widget app for iPhone — track birthdays, trips, goals, and every date that matters

## About
DayDrop is an iOS countdown widget app that helps users track important dates with beautiful AI-generated backgrounds, Dynamic Island live activities, and 6 widget families. Built by indie developer Hirak Banerjee.

## Key Features
- AI-Generated Backgrounds: Describe your event and get a unique AI-created image
- Dynamic Island Live Activities: Real-time countdown without unlocking your phone
- 6 Widget Families: 3 Home Screen sizes, 3 Lock Screen styles, StandBy, Apple Watch
- Birthday Import: Pull birthdays from Contacts with duplicate detection
- iCloud Sync: All countdowns sync across iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch
- 16 Languages: Full interface localization
- Smart Notifications: Reminders at 30, 14, 7, 3, and 0 days

## Pricing
- Free: Unlimited countdowns, basic widgets, photo backgrounds
- Annual ($12.99/year): AI backgrounds, all widgets, Live Activities (1-month free trial)
- Lifetime ($24.99): Everything, forever

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://daydrop.beatroot.dev
- Blog: https://daydrop.beatroot.dev/blog/

- Countdown Widget Guide: https://daydrop.beatroot.dev/blog/countdown-widget-iphone.html
- Privacy Policy: https://daydrop.beatroot.dev/privacy.html
- Support: https://daydrop.beatroot.dev/support.html

## Use Cases
- Countdown to birthdays and anniversaries
- Vacation and trip countdowns
- Wedding countdown widgets
- Exam and deadline tracking
- Goal and milestone tracking
- Holiday countdowns (Christmas, New Year, etc.)

## Entity Information
- Developer: Hirak Banerjee
- Platform: iOS 18+
- Category: Productivity / Lifestyle
- Rating: 4.8/5 stars
- Twitter: @hirak8
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6759470132

## Technical
- Built with: SwiftUI, WidgetKit, ActivityKit, SwiftData
- Requirements: iOS 18.0+, iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch
